channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Chain-of-Thought
channel.description: Latest Chain-of-Thought news in Context Engineering

item.title: LLM Reasoning Is Latent, Not the Chain of Thought
item.description: arXiv:2604.15726v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This position paper argues that large language model (LLM) reasoning should be studied as latent-state trajectory formation rather than as faithful surface chain-of-thought (CoT). This matters because claims about faithfulness, interpretability, reaso...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> CoT, model, study, LLM, chain-of-thought | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Structured Abductive-Deductive-Inductive Reasoning for LLMs via Algebraic Invariants
item.description: arXiv:2604.15727v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models exhibit systematic limitations in structured logical reasoning: they conflate hypothesis generation with verification, cannot distinguish conjecture from validated knowledge, and allow weak reasoning steps to propagate unchecked ...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, LLM, chain-of-thought, large language model, reasoning | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: ThinkSound - [NeurIPS 2025] PyTorch implementation of [ThinkSound], a unified framework for generating audio from any modality, guided by Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning.
item.description: [NeurIPS 2025] PyTorch implementation of [ThinkSound], a unified framework for generating audio from any modality, guided by Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> audio, CoT, chain-of-thought, reasoning, framework | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: PageIndex - 📑 PageIndex: Document Index for Vectorless, Reasoning-based RAG
item.description: 📑 PageIndex: Document Index for Vectorless, Reasoning-based RAG<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> reasoning, vector, RAG | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: Cline-Recursive-Chain-of-Thought-System-CRCT- - A framework designed to manage context, dependencies, and tasks in large-scale Cline projects within VS Code
item.description: A framework designed to manage context, dependencies, and tasks in large-scale Cline projects within VS Code<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> chain-of-thought, framework, context | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>

item.title: cosmos-reason1 - Cosmos-Reason1 models understand the physical common sense and generate appropriate embodied decisions in natural language through long chain-of-thought reasoning processes.
item.description: Cosmos-Reason1 models understand the physical common sense and generate appropriate embodied decisions in natural language through long chain-of-thought reasoning processes.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> chain-of-thought, reasoning, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
